Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Represents an AC Service or Repair Booking ticket

id.description: Unique JOB ID of the booking

issue.description: Details of the problem or symptom

timestamp.description: Formatted short time string at creation

status.description: Lifecycle state of the service ticket

createdAt.description: Firestore server timestamp of booking creation

updatedAt.description: Firestore server timestamp of booking last update

/bookings/{bookingId}.description: Collection of all AC customer repair and service tickets
